feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: Muhammad Junaid Ali Asif Raja (Junaid Ali). Machine Learning Researcher and Direct PhD student at National Yunlin University of Science and Technology, Taiwan. Works on Fractional Machine Learning / Deep Learning: intelligent neural surrogates for nonlinear and fractional-order dynamical systems, and fractional-calculus-inspired deep learning optimization. 30 publications, 27 indexed in the WoS Core Collection (h-index 9, 216 Google Scholar citations).
